name: modernize-tests
description: Migration pack: raise a legacy test suite to current conventions (table tests, determinism, coverage) without changing product behavior.

files.content:
# Steering — {{TITLE}}

Goal: modernize the test suite — deterministic, table-driven, hermetic — without touching product behavior.

Conventions:
- No new flakiness: every test is deterministic (FakeClock, no wall-clock/network).
- Coverage must not regress.
- Product source changes are out of scope unless a test reveals a real defect (log it as midreq).

# Tasks — {{TITLE}} (template)

Task DAG shape (fill in `files:` and `verify:` per your repo):

- T1 Catalog legacy tests and their smells. deps: —
- T2 Introduce shared fixtures/harness. deps: T1
- T3 Convert to table tests, remove nondeterminism. deps: T2
- T4 Verify coverage held or improved. deps: T3
